steps.title: Convert the linear measurement to squared
steps.content: To convert area units, the conversion factor must be squared. Since 1 mile = 1,760 yards: $$(1,760)^2 = 3,097,600 \text{ square yards per square mile}$$

steps.title: Divide the area to find square miles
steps.content: Divide the town's area by the conversion factor: $$\frac{12,669,184}{3,097,600} = 4.09 \text{ square miles}$$ That matches Choice C — $4.09$.
